rewards.description: 🎮 Announcing Kakele Online's Epic Twitch Drops!  Embark on a unique journey in Kakele's realm. Dive into mystical lands, conquer quests, and enjoy our exciting Twitch Drops for enhanced gaming. Unlock rewards, including teleports, herbs, potions, and materials.  🕒 Timed Rewards: Enjoy cities Teleports, Ultra potions, Gold Refiner Kits and collect Dog Cards and Trophies.  💰 Prosperity Path: Gain Copper, Tin, Silver, Iron, Gold, Life Herbs, Mana Herbs for success. Accumulate Reputation Coins.  🎈 Grand Finale: End with an exclusive Twitch Drop and Bacon Extravaganza surprise! Link accounts, watch streams, and claim rewards for an unforgettable RPG experience.  🌟 How to Join:  Link Accounts: Connect your account and Twitch in the game app. Watch Streams: Tune in during to your favorite Kakele streamer. Claim Rewards: Receive Twitch Drop notifications claim in the game app.  Influencers: To enable drops on your stream, email us!  Don't miss the chance to enrich your journey with Twitch Drops!
rewards.name: Kakele Online - May

rewards.description: To celebrate our 1st Anniversary , we’re bringing you a new exclusive Twitch Drops event! Watch Arena Breakout: Infinite content with enabled Twitch Drops for 4 hours to unlock Twitch Exclusive Skin - Infinite Memory! Please link your Level Infinite Pass account and Twitch Account on the event page https://www.arenabreakoutinfinite.com/twitchdrops , and claim your Drops rewards in time.
rewards.name: ABI Partner-Only Drops

rewards.description: To celebrate the ABI Anniversary Event and in response to popular demand, we are bringing back 9 streamer stickers from the past seasons. Viewers will be rewarded for gifting subscriptions to these eligible streamers in the Arena Breakout: Infinite (ABI) category: ImOw, GL40LabsRaT, HITBOXKING, Arven93, LVNDMARK, QuattroAce, Kritikal, BakedJake, Ralisco. Support your favorite eligible streamers and receive the exclusive Stickers! Note that Viewers who had claimed any of these streamer stickers before S5 cannot re-claim the same stickers this time, and subscriptions will only count toward the event task if gifted while the streamer is live and broadcasting ABI content. Please link your Level Infinite Pass account and Twitch Account on the event page https://www.arenabreakoutinfinite.com/twitchdrops , and claim your Drops rewards in time.
rewards.name: S5 Support ABI Partners

rewards.description:
DRAGON'S CLAIM IS HERE! 
The Mid-Season Update unleashes a brand-new 5v5 LTM where control, teamplay & siege tactics rule. Plant the banner, hold the zone, stack cash. Do watch the skies though, A fire-breathing Dragon is hunting the banner-bearers. Spin the Scales of Fortune for 20+ free rewards, gear up with the Helion Exarch Set, and claim the crown that remains. Tune in, watch, and earn exclusive Twitch Drops!
rewards.name: DRAGON'S CLAIM
